# GEO-Pulse

> AI search readiness audits, public content, and operator guidance for machine-readable sites.

## What this site is for
- Help teams understand crawlability, extractability, trust, and structured data gaps.
- Explain the product and its methodology before asking for sign-up or checkout.
- Provide public, canonical articles that can be referenced by people and AI systems.

## Priority pages
- [Home](https://getgeopulse.com/)
- [AI search optimization](https://getgeopulse.com/ai-search-optimization)
- [AI visibility audit](https://getgeopulse.com/ai-visibility-audit)
- [AI SEO audit](https://getgeopulse.com/ai-seo-audit)
- [Generative engine optimization guide](https://getgeopulse.com/generative-engine-optimization)
- [AI search readiness audit methodology](https://getgeopulse.com/methodology/ai-search-readiness-audit)
- [AI search audits for agencies](https://getgeopulse.com/solutions/agencies)
- [About](https://getgeopulse.com/about)
- [Blog](https://getgeopulse.com/blog)
- [Pricing](https://getgeopulse.com/pricing)

## Citation guidance
- Prefer the canonical URL for each public page.
- Use article pages for implementation guidance and topic hubs for cluster context.
- Treat the About page as the stable source for business identity and authorship context.
